历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 11163 → 22445 → 17461 → 19462 → 102972. In 2025, there was a clear discontinuity, with the minimum ranking significantly dropping to about 103,000, making the baseline ranking abnormally high. The university's enrollment plan in Guangxi for Physics Category was 70 in 2021, 81 in 2022, 82 in 2023, 115 in 2024, and 115 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 136, an increase of 21 students (+18.3%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and may ease competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 71st on the Soft Science main list, with a steady rise in recent years (from 83rd in 2021 to 71st in 2026), indicating continuously strengthening comprehensive strength. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to poor employment data (the employment rate of the College of Life Sciences is only 4.63%), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranks 62nd, with an average evaluation and moderate short video exposure. It has Ethnology A+ (top in the country), Ecology A, and Statistics A-, totaling 3 disciplines at A- or above, showing outstanding disciplinary strength among 211 universities, which is attractive for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular/recommended in society, matching the university's engineering offerings. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 269,000, an increase of about 3.3% from 260,000 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition. In 2025, the undergraduate batch cutoff for Physics Category was 370 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 495 points. Yunnan University is located in neighboring Yunnan Province, geographically close to Guangxi with similar climate and culture, offering some regional appeal to Guangxi candidates. The university enrolls a very high proportion (about 60%+) in its own province (Yunnan), while in Guangxi it accounts for about 2–3%, a medium scale for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal discontinuity in 2025, the significant 18.3% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the slight increase in Physics Category candidates in the province, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will recover somewhat from the 2025 discontinuity level (ranking number decreases), but the expansion effect and negative reputation will partially offset the recovery. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 102,829, with a range of 102,329 to 103,329.

Candidates within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (e.g., within 100,000) can aim for popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information. Candidates near the lower limit should prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

It is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; it ranks approximately 71st on the Soft Science main list, with a steadily rising ranking in recent years and continuously strengthening comprehensive strength.

学校层次与声誉.text: The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly due to poor employment data; it ranks 62nd in Douyin popularity, with a general evaluation and moderate short video exposure; Ethnology is A+ (top in the country), which has some relevance to History Category majors (such as History, Sociology, etc.), providing positive attraction for related major applications.
